anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Bath position extracted from architect Rev-C plan dated 2026-05-15; standard 1700x700 acrylic bath sited along the long north wall per typical UK domestic en-suite layout.
Shower-over-bath head at 2100mm AFF from architect Rev-C plumbing schedule; thermostatic mixer at midpoint of bath length on the wall side.

zones._derivation_note: Zone 0 is the interior volume of the bath basin per BS 7671:2018 §701 zone-table convention. Bounded by the bath rim (~550mm AFF). SELV-only equipment permitted; no socket/switch/non-SELV fixtures. Polygon = bath_tray rectangular footprint (500-2200 × 0-700 mm).

Zone 1 is the vertical projection above the bath polygon, from rim level (550mm) to 2250mm AFF per §701 zone-table convention. IPx4 minimum; 230V class_1/2 permitted with RCD. Overlaps shower_1 zone_1 polygon — overlap recorded for INV-01 catalogue integrity.

Zone 1 from shower_1 head at 2100mm AFF: zone extends vertically from floor to shower-head height per §701 zone-table where shower head fixes Zone 1 ceiling. Coincides with bath polygon (shower-over-bath). Overlap with zone_bath_1_z1 declared per INV-01.

Zone 2 = 600mm horizontal extension of Zone 1 polygon per §701 zone-table; unclipped polygon shown for derivation transparency. In practice clipped to room polygon (intersection with [0,0]-[2700,2100] is [0,0]-[2700,1300]). Socket outlets prohibited within 3m of Zone 1 per §701.512.3.

Zone 2 from shower_1: 600mm horizontal extension of Zone 1; vertical ceiling tied to shower head (2100mm) per §701 zone-table. Polygon coincides with bath_1 zone_2 because shower-over-bath shares the wet area. Overlap with zone_bath_1_z2 declared per INV-01.

electrical_constraints._derivation_note: 30 mA RCD protection required for all low-voltage circuits serving locations containing a bath or shower per BS 7671:2018 §701.411.3.3. Heater exemption does not apply here — bathroom, not sauna.

assumptions: Cascade source: standalone C.1 example uk-bathroom-standard-bath-and-shower. Synthetic upstream db-layout intent supplies the bathroom-serving circuit catalogue with every circuit routed through a 30mA RCD per BS 7671:2018 §701.411.3.3.
Demonstrates db-layout INV-16 sub-check 3 (rcd_blanket_by_room enforcement) PASS — every bathroom-serving circuit's upstream protective device is a 30mA RCD or RCBO with 30mA RCD-element.
Bath rim height defaulted to 550mm AFF (typical UK acrylic bath); engineer-of-record to verify against manufacturer datasheet.
Shower head at 2100mm AFF treated as Zone 1 ceiling per BS 7671:2018 §701 zone-table convention.

invariants.evidence: 2 anchor_fixtures (bath_1 + shower_1) produce 5 zones[] (bath_1 → z0+z1+z2; shower_1 → z1+z2). Overlaps between zone_bath_1_z1↔zone_shower_1_z1 and zone_bath_1_z2↔zone_shower_1_z2 declared via overlapping_with_zone_ids[] — no silent merges.
existing_fixtures_audit[] has 3 entries, all compliance_status=compliant. non_compliance_flags[] is empty. One-to-one correspondence trivially holds (zero violations on both sides).
No medical_envelope_group_2 zone present in IR. §710 Group 2 medical IT system requirement N/A; INV-03 vacuously passes per spec §7.2.

room_type=bathroom; rcd_blanket_by_room constraint PRESENT with rcd_rating_ma=30 and sauna_heater_excluded=false per BS 7671:2018 §701.411.3.3. RCD blanket applies to all bathroom circuits — DRIVES downstream db-layout INV-16 sub-check 3 (every bathroom-serving circuit's upstream protective device verified as 30mA RCD or RCBO with 30mA element).
room_type=bathroom, not swimming_pool_hall. §702.415.1 main equipotential bonding requirement N/A; INV-05 vacuously passes.
bath_1 has bath_kind=standard, not whirlpool. §701.512.2 IPx5 whirlpool pump constraint N/A; INV-06 vacuously passes.
No elv_lighting_circuit_anchor in anchor_fixtures. §715 + BS EN 61558-2-6 elv_separation constraint N/A; INV-07 vacuously passes.

3 existing fixtures audited: lum_1 (IPx4, 230V, RCD) at (1350,1400,2400) — outside all zone polygons (Zone 2 max y=1300); compliant. lum_2 (IPx4, 230V, RCD) at (1050,350,2400) — sits above Zone 1 (height_max 2250 < 2400 fixture z); compliant. shaver_1 (IPx0, 230V, BS EN 61558-2-5 compliant shaver socket) at (2400,1800,1400) — outside Zone 2 (y=1800 > 1300); compliant. All 4 sub-rules (type, IP, switch-distance, voltage) PASS for all 3 fixtures.

Both anchor_fixtures use _extraction_source=architectural_drawing_extraction (strongest tier). bath_1 _provenance_note 173 chars; shower_1 _provenance_note 164 chars — both ≥40. Provenance disclosure complete.

compliant=true ∧ violation_count_critical=0 ∧ non_compliance_flags=[] ∧ no zone has overlapping_with_zone_ids beyond the declared sibling-pair overlaps (which are catalogued, not silent). Self-consistency holds.

rationale.chat_summary: Cascade retrofit of C.1 example #1 (uk-bathroom-standard-bath-and-shower) for the db-layout consumer. Synthetic upstream db-layout intent models bathroom-serving circuits all routed through 30mA RCDs per §701.411.3.3. Demonstrates db-layout INV-16 sub-check 3 (rcd_blanket_by_room enforcement) PASS.

sections.title: Cascade context
sections.summary: Cascade retrofit of C.1 standalone uk-bathroom-standard-bath-and-shower for the db-layout consumer. The zones, constraints, and 3 fixture audit entries (2 luminaires + 1 shaver socket, all compliant) are identical to the C.1 source. The cascade demonstrates db-layout INV-16 sub-check 3 — the synthetic upstream db-layout intent models every bathroom-serving circuit routed through a 30mA RCD per the rcd_blanket_by_room constraint cascaded from special-locations.

sections.title: Standards applied
sections.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §701.411.3.3 mandates 30mA RCD protection on all low-voltage circuits serving locations containing a bath or shower. The rcd_blanket_by_room constraint enforces this at the db-layout layer: every circuit whose final load is inside the bathroom polygon (or feeds a bathroom load) must have a 30mA RCD or RCBO with 30mA RCD-element as the upstream protective device.

sections.title: INV-08 sub-rule walk-through
sections.summary: Identical to cascade #9 (uk-bathroom-standard-bath-and-shower). 12 sub-rule evaluations (3 fixtures × 4 sub-rules) PASS. All fixtures sit outside the §701 zone polygons in plan or above max-height; derived_zone_id=null for all 3.

sections.title: Consumer-side hand-off — db-layout INV-16 sub-check 3 (the cascade core)
sections.summary: db-layout v1.5 INV-16 sub-check 3 (RCD-blanket-by-room enforcement) iterates over every circuit in the db-layout output IR whose final load is inside the bathroom polygon. For each circuit, it verifies upstream_protective_device.type ∈ {RCD_30mA, RCBO_30mA_combined_protection}. For this cascade: 3 circuits modelled (lighting circuit feeding lum_1+lum_2, shaver-socket circuit feeding shaver_1, and a future bathroom-fan circuit reserved by db-layout for completeness) — every one routed through a 30mA RCBO per §701.411.3.3. INV-16 sub-check 3 PASSes.

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: Synthetic upstream db-layout intent — the v1.5 hand-off contract is not yet shipped. Cascade contract integrity is verified via golden CI gate Pass 4 (intent-out validation against special-locations-zoning-intent schema), NOT runtime consumption of a real db-layout intent. The rcd_blanket_by_room constraint sauna_heater_excluded=false (bathroom, not sauna).
